use std::thread;

fn spawn_workers(tasks: Vec<String>) {
    let handles: Vec<_> = tasks.into_iter()
        .map(|task| thread::spawn(move || process(task)))
        .collect();
    for handle in handles {
        handle.join().unwrap();
    }
}

fn spawn_detached_worker(task: String) {
    let builder = thread::Builder::new().name("worker".into());
    builder.spawn(move || {
        process(task);
    }).expect("failed to spawn worker");
}

fn process(_s: String) {}
